tree.setup: Your internet has been down for two days. You're calling the telecom company's customer service line. After navigating an automated menu (press 1 for Mandarin, press 2 for billing...), you finally reach a human -- Xiao Jiang, a customer service representative who speaks at the speed of an auctioneer but is genuinely trying to help. She has clearly had a long day.
tree.setup_zh: 你的网断了两天了。你打电信公司客服电话。按了一堆自动菜单（普通话按1，账单按2……）之后终于接通了人工客服——小蒋，说话速度像拍卖师但真心想帮忙。她今天显然很累了。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 您好，工号2847，请问有什么可以帮您？
turns.text_pinyin: nín hǎo, gōnghào èr bā sì qī, qǐngwèn yǒu shénme kěyǐ bāng nín?
turns.text_en: Hello, agent number 2847, how can I help you?

options.text_zh: 你好，我家的网络断了两天了。我已经重启了路由器好几次，还是不行。
options.text_pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ jiā de wǎngluò duàn le liǎng tiān le. wǒ yǐjīng chóngqǐ le lùyóuqì hǎo jǐ cì, háishi bù xíng.
options.text_en: Hello, my home internet has been down for two days. I've already restarted the router several times and it still doesn't work.
options.feedback: Xiao Jiang sounds impressed.「您已经重启过了？那我帮您查一下线路。」Mentioning you've already tried the basics saves her from asking. 断了 means 'cut off.' 好几次 is 'quite a few times.'

options.text_zh: 我的网不能用了！怎么回事？
options.text_pinyin: wǒ de wǎng bù néng yòng le! zěnme huí shì?
options.text_en: My internet doesn't work! What's going on?
options.feedback: 「请问断了多长时间了？」Xiao Jiang needs details. 怎么回事 is 'what's going on' -- expresses frustration but she needs specifics to help you.

options.text_zh: 我想投诉。我交了钱但是没有网络。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ xiǎng tóusù. wǒ jiāo le qián dànshì méiyǒu wǎngluò.
options.text_en: I want to file a complaint. I've paid but there's no internet.
options.feedback: Xiao Jiang's voice stays calm.「我理解您的心情。我先帮您排查一下问题好吗？」投诉 is 'file a complaint.' Starting with complaints makes solving the problem harder.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好的，我查到了。您那个小区这两天在维修线路，预计明天下午恢复。给您造成不便，非常抱歉。
turns.text_pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ chá dào le. nín nà ge xiǎoqū zhè liǎng tiān zài wéixiū xiànlù, yùjì míngtiān xiàwǔ huīfù. gěi nín zàochéng bú biàn, fēicháng bàoqiàn.
turns.text_en: OK, I found it. Your neighborhood has been undergoing line maintenance these past two days. It's expected to be restored tomorrow afternoon. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Ask about compensation or a more specific timeline.

options.text_zh: 明天下午大概几点？我在家工作，需要网络。可以减免这两天的费用吗？
options.text_pinyin: míngtiān xiàwǔ dàgài jǐ diǎn? wǒ zài jiā gōngzuò, xūyào wǎngluò. kěyǐ jiǎnmiǎn zhè liǎng tiān de fèiyòng ma?
options.text_en: Around what time tomorrow afternoon? I work from home and need internet. Can the fees for these two days be waived?
options.feedback: 「我帮您申请减免，两天的费用会在下个月的账单里扣除。预计明天三点左右恢复。」减免 is 'reduce/waive.' 费用 is 'fees.' Asking for compensation is completely reasonable.

options.text_zh: 为什么没有提前通知我们？
options.text_en: Why weren't we notified in advance?
options.feedback: 「这个确实是我们的问题，应该提前通知的。我帮您记录下来。」提前通知 is 'notify in advance.' A fair question -- Xiao Jiang agrees.

options.text_pinyin: hǎo ba, nà wǒ zhǐnéng děng le.
options.text_en: OK, I guess I can only wait then.
options.feedback: Xiao Jiang pauses.「其实您可以申请费用减免的……」只能 is 'can only.' You're leaving compensation on the table.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 减免已经帮您申请了。还有别的问题吗？如果明天下午还没恢复，您可以再打这个电话。
turns.text_pinyin: jiǎnmiǎn yǐjīng bāng nín shēnqǐng le. hái yǒu bié de wèntí ma? rúguǒ míngtiān xiàwǔ hái méi huīfù, nín kěyǐ zài dǎ zhè ge diànhuà.
turns.text_en: The fee waiver has been submitted for you. Any other questions? If it's still not restored tomorrow afternoon, you can call this number again.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Thank her and wrap up the call.

options.text_zh: 谢谢你帮忙！请问你的工号是多少？万一明天没恢复我好说明情况。
options.text_pinyin: xièxie nǐ bāngmáng! qǐngwèn nǐ de gōnghào shì duōshao? wànyī míngtiān méi huīfù wǒ hǎo shuōmíng qíngkuàng.
options.text_en: Thanks for your help! What's your agent number? Just in case it's not restored tomorrow so I can explain the situation.
options.feedback: 「2847。希望明天就好了！」Noting the agent number is smart for follow-up calls. 万一 means 'just in case.' 说明情况 is 'explain the situation.' Xiao Jiang appreciates being acknowledged.

options.text_pinyin: hǎo de, xièxie! xīnkǔ nǐ le.
options.feedback: 辛苦你了 is 'you've worked hard' -- a thoughtful phrase that acknowledges the person's effort. Xiao Jiang's day just got slightly better. Customer service reps rarely hear this.
Functional but cold. Xiao Jiang moves on to her next call. A little warmth goes a long way with people who field complaints all day.

tree.cultural_note: Chinese customer service calls start with the agent's 工号 (gōnghào, agent number) for accountability. 辛苦了 (xīnkǔ le, 'you've worked hard') is a powerful phrase that shows appreciation. When disputing bills, 减免 (jiǎnmiǎn) is the key word for fee waiver/reduction.
